title: Simply, Money
description: Mod that adds decoration-only cards and cash! I use Chexian Rupees, btw.
body:
<font size="7"> **Simply, Money** </font>

<font size="4">Simply, Money adds simple items such cards and cash :P</font>
#
<font size="6"> **FAQ** </font>

<font size="4">

**Q**: Why is there only one item - the Debit Card? (0.0.1)

**A**: I had a lack of time.

**Q**: How to get the mod's items?

**A**: Use /give @p simplymoney: (/give @p simply_money: on 1.1.0 and later)

</font>

#

<font size="6"> **KNOWN ISSUES** </font>

- <font size="5">The ATM doesn't show the GUI</font>
- <font size="5">The ATM uses grass SFX (should use Metal SFX)</font>

#
